ddls:
CREATE TABLE "criteria" (
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criterion */,
  "criterion_name" TEXT /* Name of the criterion (e.g., Manufacture Cost, Charge Capacity) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the criterion in the AHP analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the criterion */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the criterion */,
  "importance_level" INTEGER /* Relative importance of the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_types" (
  "battery_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery type */,
  "battery_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the battery type (e.g., AA Batteries, 9V Battery, LiPo Battery) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the battery type */,
  "size" TEXT /* Physical size of the battery type */,
  "rechargeable" INTEGER /* Whether the battery type is rechargeable */,
  "replacement_accessibility" REAL /* Score indicating the ease of replacing the battery type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_scores" (
  "performance_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance score */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion being evaluated */,
  "battery_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery type being evaluated */,
  "score" REAL /* Performance score of the battery type against the criterion */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the performance score was evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_scores_battery_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_type_id") REFERENCES battery_types ("battery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "customer_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer */,
  "criterion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the criterion */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Customer's preference score for the criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_criterion_id FOREIGN KEY ("criterion_id") REFERENCES criteria ("criterion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer */,
  "battery_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended battery type */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_battery_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_type_id") REFERENCES battery_types ("battery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "battery_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery type sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of batteries sold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_battery_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_type_id") REFERENCES battery_types ("battery_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
